description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat, angular roof and a striking geometric facade. The exterior features a mix of dark and light panels, with a prominent use of black, gray, and white, accented by wooden slats on the porch and pergola. Large glass windows and sliding doors are visible on multiple sides, allowing for ample natural light and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection. The front of the bungalow includes a covered porch area with a wooden pergola, providing both shade and architectural interest. The structure sits on a patterned concrete base, which extends around the perimeter and enhances the contemporary aesthetic. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on functional outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, geometric facade, large glass windows, and a wooden pergola over a covered porch. The exterior features a bold mix of black, gray, white, and wood accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch with a wooden pergola, large glass windows, and the main entrance area.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting a large sliding glass door, wooden privacy screen, and patterned concrete patio.
description_view_2: Opposite front view with a clear look at the porch, pergola, and the full width of the glass facade.
description_view_3: Side view displaying solid wall panels, minimal windows, and the edge of the porch structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding doors
